author: pan4ratte
description: Allows you to create and quickly apply regex actions via command palette, context menus and hotkeys. Made for automation purposes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
## What's New

* New feature: Run quick actions on any number of selected files.
* UX enhancement: Run any quick action from the context menus.
* UX enhancement: Obsidian Bases are now supported.

## Bug Fixes

* Bug fix: Now all replacements are counted correctly.
* Bug fix: Now replacement notification is always displayed.

## Other Changes

* Refactored internal plugin structure.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-regex-quick-actions/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: pan4ratte
releases.description:
# What's new

User data storage method update: previously rulesets were stored in `/regex-rulesets` folder inside your vault. Now all user data is stored in `data.json`, which ensures less intrusive plugin attitude. On update migration is automatic: plugin will transfer your user data to `data.json` and delete `/regex-rulesets` folder. If deletion didn't happen, you can do that manually.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pan4ratte/obsidian-regex-quick-actions/compare/1.2.0...1.3.0
